_note: Sample output from fetch_gmail.py → data/rides.json. Each ride is one array entry.

daily_digest_ride_example.subject: Your receipt for rides on March 20
daily_digest_ride_example._note: Digest rides have no station/location data. Run extrapolate_stations.py to fill gaps.

intermediate_files.data/citibike_message_ids.json: Array of [message_id, subject, date] tuples from Gmail search
intermediate_files.data/stations.json: GBFS station data: [{id, name, lat, lon, cap}, ...] used by extrapolate_stations.py
intermediate_files.data/batch*_rides.json: Intermediate checkpoint files from earlier batch processing (can be ignored)
intermediate_files.data/rides.json: Final combined output — all parsed rides in one array
